issues.detail: Missing coverage of error scenarios and edge cases in the instructions.
Skill is vendor-locked to PyTorch and requires CUDA GPU, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: ResNet50 fine-tune with mixed precision and pin_memory
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for ResNet50 fine-tuning and AdamW but tends to use the older torch.cuda.amp API and forgets pin_memory plus CosineAnnealingLR; treatment combines weights=ResNet50_Weights.DEFAULT, nn.Linear(2048, num_classes), DataLoader with num_workers=4 and pin_memory=True, torch.amp.autocast, AdamW and CosineAnnealingLR as documented.

scenarios.name: BERT sentiment classifier with torch.export
scenarios.rationale: Baseline typically saves via state_dict or HF save_pretrained and skips gradient clipping; treatment uses AutoModel/AutoTokenizer with linear warmup, clip_grad_norm_, and torch.export() for production export per the documented production path.
